title: Loose files win over archived assets at runtime

canonical.answer: Loose files generally take precedence over archived assets, so plugin load order by itself does not determine every visible asset winner.

additions: BA2 packaging and precombine/previs state can explain visible results even when plugin records appear clean.

warnings.text: Check precombine and previs integrity before blaming load order alone.

additions: Generated behavior outputs from tools such as Nemesis or FNIS can dominate animation behavior.

warnings.text: Inspect generated animation behavior files when assets look correct but behavior does not.
